reviews.review_description: very fun with friends and scary survival game
does not work loaded into the main menu with the key pad and nothing worked at all couldn't leave the menu

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. I’m sorry to hear that you had issues with the game. Could you please let me know what exactly didn’t work for you? I’m actively fixing everything I’m aware of and improving the game with each update. I’d really appreciate the details, and I hope future updates might change your mind about the game.

reviews.review_description: Fun game im sure the game is gonna be viral in some time
